title: analytics — Artisan commands
description: 10 ops + support commands. Read-heavy — tenant admins mostly consume the HTTP surface; these commands are for platform-ops + on-call debugging.

commands.purpose: Paginated list of AnalyticsEvent rows. Same filters as GET /api/v1/analytics/events. Useful for CLI-based investigation.
Dump a single AnalyticsEvent + all its AnalyticsDelivery rows (per-provider fan-out). Includes property blob, context, attribution snapshot, consent snapshot. Debugging aid.
Paginated delivery log across events. Useful for 'why is Amplitude returning 429?' investigation.
List AnalyticsProviderConfig rows. Redacts config column by default; --reveal-config flag requires super_admin.
Create or update an AnalyticsProviderConfig from the CLI. --config accepts a JSON blob or a Doppler secret reference (secret://<path>). Rate-limited to 20/day/operator.
Dispatch a synthetic test event to a single provider config. Verifies credentials + endpoint reachability. Uses test_mode=true so events land in the provider's debug view, not production analytics.
Paginated AnalyticsIdentity list. Includes first_seen_at + last_seen_at + identified_at + identified_user_id. device_fingerprint_hash hidden by default.

Merge one or more AnalyticsIdentity rows INTO a survivor. Rewrites subject_id on historical events. Enterprise-only (analytics_identity_merge entitlement). Refused without --reason. Rate-limited to 10/hour.
Compute a funnel report for a given funnel_key over a time window. Groups by subject to compute per-step conversion. Emits table or CSV or JSON. Consumes FunnelReportBuilder service.

Compute per-variant results for a running or completed experiment. Metric options: conversion_rate, uplift, sample_size, p_value. Consumes ExperimentAssignmentReportBuilder + a companion outcome-metric resolver.
